---
title: "Higher Reading-Book for Schools, Colleges and General Use. Edited with introduction and notes by Charlotte M. Yonge."
---

## Higher Reading-Book for Schools, Colleges and General Use. Edited with introduction and notes by Charlotte M. Yonge.

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1885
**Genre:** Non-fiction: edited selection
**Format:** Edited book

**Publisher:** National Society’s Depository, Broad Sanctuary, London.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
